fields.title: Add per-agent tool allowlists for subagents
fields.description: Tau subagents currently receive the default coding tools plus custom tools. Add a simple explicit allowlist so each agent definition can declare the exact tools it may use.
fields.design: Add optional tools: string[] to agent definitions and agent settings overrides. Keep phase 1 replace-only: no deny rules, no action-level permissions, no complexity-specific tool overrides. Enforce after session creation by validating configured names against session.getAllTools() and calling session.setActiveToolsByName(). Treat agent as a normal optional tool. Always auto-enable submit_result when structured output is required. If tools is omitted, preserve current behavior.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Agent markdown and settings overrides can define tools as a string array. Unknown tool names fail fast with clear errors. Worker sessions activate exactly the configured tool set plus mandatory internal submit_result when applicable. Omitting tools preserves current behavior. Tests cover parsing, settings validation, runtime activation, and structured-output auto-enable. Docs/examples describe the new field and bundled agents can opt into explicit tool sets.
fields.notes: Implemented phase-1 per-agent tool allowlists: parser + settings overrides support optional tools arrays, worker sessions now clamp active tools via session.setActiveToolsByName(), structured-output workers auto-keep submit_result when tools are explicitly configured, added parser/registry/runtime tests, updated bundled agent definitions and agent-creation skill docs.
fields.close_reason: Added explicit per-agent tool allowlists for subagents, enforced active tools at worker session startup, covered parser/settings/runtime behavior with tests, and updated bundled agents/docs.
